ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Unique number assigned to the flight */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the airline operating the flight */,
  "departure_airport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the departure airport */,
  "arrival_airport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the arrival airport */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time of the flight */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time of the flight */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the flight */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers the flight can accommodate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_arrival_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrival_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_departure_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("departure_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the airline */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the airline */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the airline */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the airline's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "destinations" (
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight this destination belongs to */,
  "destination_name" TEXT /* Name of the destination (e.g., Myrtle, Orlando-Sanford (SFB)) */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time at the destination */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance to the destination in kilometers or miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_destinations_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight frequency */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight this frequency belongs to */,
  "flight_date" TEXT /* Date the flight is scheduled */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the flight is scheduled */,
  "is_weekly" INTEGER /* Indicates if the flight is a weekly schedule */,
  "is_monthly" INTEGER /* Indicates if the flight is a monthly schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_frequencies_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight this passenger is booked on */,
  "passenger_name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number for international flights */,
  "frequent_flyer_number" TEXT /* Frequent flyer number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight status */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight this status belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flight (e.g., on-time, delayed, cancelled) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the flight status was updated */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time of the flight */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time of the flight */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for any delay or cancellation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_status_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight history */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight this history belongs to */,
  "flight_date" TEXT /* Date the flight took place */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flight (e.g., on-time, delayed, cancelled) */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time of the flight */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time of the flight */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for any delay or cancellation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_history_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, passenger) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight this notification belongs to */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger this notification was sent to */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message sent to the passenger */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., delay, cancellation, boarding) */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_notifications_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_notifications_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_notifications_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, passenger) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., can_edit_flights, can_view_reports) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user this role belongs to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* IATA or ICAO code of the airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)
